$description: Kotlin brand gradients. Stored as raw CSS strings (DTCG W3C does not yet have a stable gradient $type) — Style Dictionary emits them verbatim into CSS variables.

kt-gradient.$description: Official radial gradient from kotlinlang.org K-mark. Red → magenta → purple, top-right anchor.

kt-gradient-linear.$description: Linear approximation of the K-mark gradient at 225°. For hero text, banners, rectangular surfaces.

kt-gradient-soft.$description: Pastel soft variant of the brand gradient. For backgrounds and washes.
